title: jaltomata nitida
intro: Jaltomata nitida, also known as the Prickly Apple or Jaltomate, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to Central America and Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Jaltomata nitida include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with the leaves and stems being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
